page: Alibaba Cloud ecs.n1.xlarge is a compute-optimized virtual machine instance powered by the KVM hypervisor. It features an Intel Xeon 8269CY processor with 8 dedicated physical cores and 8 vCPUs running at a base clock speed of 2.5 GHz. The instance is configured with 16.0 GB of system memory, yielding a 2.0 GB memory-per-core ratio. It does not include local storage or bundled GPUs, requiring external block storage for persistent data. The underlying x86_64 architecture supports advanced instruction sets, including AVX, AVX512F, AVX512_VNNI, AES cryptography, and FMA.

In benchmark evaluations, the instance demonstrates moderate multi-core processing capabilities, with stress-ng multi-core performance and PassMark CPU scores falling within the average range. However, single-core performance is relatively weak, as evidenced by lower stress-ng single-core results and poor single-threaded compression and decompression throughput. Memory bandwidth remains stable and average for both cached and uncached operations, though PassMark memory and database operation benchmarks indicate some latency constraints, placing them in the lower quartile. Redis SET operations perform adequately, achieving average throughput.

Given its hardware profile and performance characteristics, the ecs.n1.xlarge is qualitatively cost-efficient for workloads that benefit from dedicated CPU cores but do not demand high memory-per-core ratios or local storage. It is suitable for multi-threaded batch processing, moderate web serving, and distributed computing tasks that can leverage AVX-512 vector instructions.
description: Alibaba Cloud ecs.n1.xlarge is a compute-optimized virtual server featuring 8 dedicated vCPUs and 8 physical cores powered by an Intel Xeon 8269CY processor running at 2.5 GHz. Built on the x86_64 architecture and KVM hypervisor, it includes 16.0 GB of system memory, providing a 2.0 GB memory-per-core ratio, with no local storage or GPU accelerators. Performance benchmarks indicate average multi-core processing and memory bandwidth capabilities, though single-core execution and database operations are weaker. Supported instruction sets include AVX-512 and AES cryptography. This instance is best suited for multi-threaded workloads, moderate web serving, and distributed compute tasks that do not require high memory density or local storage.
og_description: Alibaba Cloud ecs.n1.xlarge is a compute-optimized instance with 8 dedicated Intel Xeon vCPUs, 16 GB RAM, and no local storage, offering balanced multi-core performance for distributed workloads.
meta_description: Alibaba Cloud ecs.n1.xlarge is an 8-vCPU compute-optimized instance with 16 GB RAM, powered by an Intel Xeon processor on the KVM hypervisor.
tagline: A dedicated eight-core compute instance with AVX-512 support, optimized for multi-threaded workloads and balanced memory bandwidth.
